mapper.select: select id, property_name, contact_person, contact_phone, address, work_time, service_content, community_id, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from community_property limit 1
mapper.update: update community_property set property_name = #{propertyName}, contact_person = #{contactPerson}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, address = #{address}, work_time = #{workTime}, service_content = #{serviceContent}, community_id = #{communityId}, create_by = #{createBy}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark} where id = #{id}
